title: lithocarpus xizangensis
intro: Lithocarpus xizangensis, also known as the Tibetan stone oak, is a species of deciduous tree in the beech family (Fagaceae) native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus xizangensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Lithocarpus xizangensis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
